human_actions_pending.action: Manual verification of Phase 2 on Linux
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 2 implementation complete but not yet tested on actual Linux environment. Phase 1 was verified; Phase 2 needs similar manual testing (shell detection, PATH check, .env loading).

decisions.decision: Shell detection: use /bin/zsh as primary, file existence as fallback; prefer .bashrc over .profile, .zshrc over .zprofile
decisions.rationale: Avoid duplicate installations, respect interactive shell conventions, provide better user experience
Simplify credential management for users; environment variables still override
Stretch goal; Phase 2 focus on core polish; can be added in Phase 3 or post-release

next_action: Choose: /gsd:verify-work 2 (manual testing) OR /gsd:plan-phase 3 (proceed to next phase)
context_notes: Phase 2 complete. All core tasks implemented. Phase 2 plan executed successfully with no issues. Code compiled, dependencies updated (dotenv added). Ready for human verification or can proceed to Phase 3 planning. Phase 1 functionality preserved — no regressions detected in code review.
